summary: Comprehensive testing of IDSEA (Indian Dairy Scientists and Entrepreneurs Association) full-stack application completed successfully. Tested 30 backend API endpoints (all passed) and all frontend pages including public website and admin panel with 13 navigation sections.
critical_code_review_comments: All APIs are functional and properly authenticated
MongoDB ObjectId is properly excluded from responses
Admin sidebar has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Public and admin routes are properly protected
seed_data_creation: Created test members and payments during API testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All public pages (Home, About, Members, Events, Publications, Gallery, Contact, Apply) and admin pages (Dashboard, Members, Payments, Events, News, Gallery, Publications, Email, Executive, Certificates, Reports, CMS, Roles) are fully functional. Admin login works with admin@idsea.org / Admin@123. All CRUD operations tested via backend API tests.

backend_tests: Public endpoints (stats, members, events, news, publications, gallery, executive, cms) - 8 tests
Auth endpoints (login, invalid login, auth/me) - 3 tests
frontend_tests: Public Homepage loads with hero section and navigation
Public Membership Apply page with form
Admin Members Management with add member modal
Admin Email System with compose modal
Admin Executive Committee with seeded data

mocked_apis.details: All APIs connect to real MongoDB. Email sending is queued but SMTP not configured. Razorpay payments work in demo mode (no API keys).
